failure_modes.text: Formal structure can become cosmetic when valid-looking logic is built on weak or untested premises.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger When Clean Structure Launders Weak Premises
failure_modes.mitigation: Audit premises before trusting the logic: valid-looking structure built on weak or untested assumptions produces confident wrong answers.

failure_modes.text: The model fails when it confuses internal coherence with truth about the world.
failure_modes.source_quote: formal rigor does not replace empirical contact with reality
failure_modes.mitigation: Distinguish internal coherence from external truth: a formally valid argument can still be disconnected from how the world actually works.

failure_modes.text: Formal reasoning breaks when hidden leaps stay implicit and no one checks whether the conclusion actually follows.
failure_modes.mitigation: Make every inference step explicit and reviewable; hidden leaps that go unchallenged are where formal reasoning quietly fails.

premortem_questions.text: What premises are doing the real work here?
If the conclusion is wrong, which inference step breaks first?
premortem_questions.source_quote: follow the logic step by step

premortem_questions.text: What evidence would show that our elegant structure is detached from reality?
premortem_questions.source_quote: does not replace empirical contact with reality

heuristics.text: Make premises explicit before debating conclusions.
Use decision trees or logic branches to expose hidden forks in the argument.
Test whether the structure actually tracks reality instead of admiring the neatness of the argument.
heuristics.source_quote: formal rigor does not replace empirical contact with reality

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on premise exposure, logical traceability, and anti-premise-laundering discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor formalism sprawl because the raw source is stronger on usable logic hygiene and decision-structure integrity.
open_questions: The third premortem item compresses several anti-false-certainty cautions so the chunk stays operational.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on decision-trees, critical-thinking, and systems-style structure as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on confirmation-bias and representativeness-style shortcutting, but only current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source has an explicit tension block around confirmation-bias and representativeness-heuristic, but only the former cleanly maps into the current target-id surface.
